title: 50 Best Treks in the World: The Ultimate Trekking Bucket List
description: A definitive ranked list of the 50 greatest multi-day trekking routes on earth — from the Annapurna Circuit to Torres del Paine, with distances, durations, and insider tips.

title: What Is a Trek? Trek vs Hike vs Backpacking vs Thru-Hiking
description: A clear explainer on what defines a trek, how it differs from hiking, backpacking, and thru-hiking — with examples of famous routes and advice for beginners.

title: 10 Best Multi-Day Treks for Beginners
description: The ten best introductory multi-day trekking routes worldwide — accessible, well-supported, and spectacular. Everything a first-time trekker needs to know.

title: Best Treks in Patagonia: The Complete Guide
description: Everything you need to know about trekking in Patagonia — Torres del Paine, Fitz Roy, Huemul Circuit, Dientes de Navarino — with planning tips and seasonal advice.

title: The Best Treks in the Himalayas
description: The definitive guide to Himalayan trekking — Everest Base Camp, Annapurna Circuit, Manaslu, Gokyo Lakes, the Snowman Trek — with altitude advice and cultural context.

title: Best Hut-to-Hut Treks in Europe
description: A complete guide to alpine hut trekking in Europe — Tour du Mont Blanc, Alta Via 1, Walker's Haute Route, GR20, Julian Alps — with booking tips and gear advice.

title: How to Plan a Multi-Day Trek: The Complete Planning Guide
description: A practical step-by-step guide to planning your first or next multi-day trek — route selection, fitness prep, gear, permits, weather, safety, and logistics.

title: The Best Treks in South America
description: The top multi-day trekking routes across Peru, Chile, Argentina, Bolivia and Ecuador — from the Inca Trail to Huayhuash, Torres del Paine to the Ausangate Circuit.

title: Best Treks in Canada: Wilderness Routes from Coast to Coast
description: Canada's greatest multi-day trekking routes — West Coast Trail, Rockwall Trail, Skyline Trail, Tombstone Territorial Park, and Berg Lake — with wilderness trekking advice.

title: The Ultimate Trekking Bucket List: 100 Greatest Treks on Earth
description: The complete trekker's bucket list — 100 of the world's greatest multi-day routes across six continents, from beginner circuits to extreme wilderness expeditions.
